description: Create a two-column content slide on importance of value creation measures in 2019 vs. 2018, with a horizontal bar chart on the left and takeaway bullets on the right.

header.kicker: Competitive dynamics and the private equity business model
header.headline: Add-ons and digitalization/Industry 4.0 will likely remain key value creators in 2019 – Increasing importance of cycle resilience
header.sub: Importance of value creation measures – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

left.title: "Which of the following portfolio improvement/value creation measures do you consider most important in 2019; which measures have been most important in 2018?"

items.text: Respondents expect add-on acquisitions and digitalization/Industry 4.0 to remain the most important value creation measures in 2019
Cycle resilience of portfolio companies is expected to become significantly more important in 2019 (vs. 2018)
Pricing, purchasing/supply chain optimization and working capital optimization/CAPEX efficiency and refinancing are considered less important in 2019
